holdings.infoBox: EWC is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are Royal Bank of Canada stock at 9.11%, The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 6.37%, SHOPIFY SUBORDINATE VOTING INC CLA at 4.51%, Enbridge at 4.00%, and Bank of Montreal at 3.80%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Canada ETF (EWC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Canada Custom Capped index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of Canadian stocks. It captures 85% of the publicly available market, excluding all small-caps. EWC was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: The Bank of Canada (BoC) maintained its key overnight rate at 2.25% on Wednesday, as expected, with the bank rate staying at 2.50% and the deposit rate remaining at 2.20%. The BoC said economic activi...

data.title: Bank of Canada Holds Interest Rates Steady As Officials Grapple With Policy Dilemma
data.text: The Bank of Canada left its policy rate unchanged at 2.25%, with Gov. Tiff Macklem saying this marked the best approach to addressing the dual-side risks of a weak economy and higher energy prices.

data.title: Canada Goods-Trade Surplus Widens in April
data.text: Canada's goods-trade surplus with the world widened to the biggest in more than a year as shipments of crude oil and vehicles to the U.S. drove exports to record high.

data.title: Canada trade surplus hits 15-month high in April on soaring crude prices
data.text: Crude oil prices pushed up by the Iran war helped propel Canada's goods trade surplus in April up by ​55% to a 15-month high of C$2.72 billion ($1.95 billion), Statistics Canada ‌said on Tuesday.

data.title: Canada Services Activity Grows Slightly in May
data.text: Activity in Canada's services industry picked up slightly last month despite a fall in new business and ongoing economic uncertainty.

data.title: Canada Factory Sales Climb 3% in March to Highest Level in More Than a Year
data.text: Manufacturing shipments increased 3% from the month before to a seasonally adjusted C$73.57 billion, the highest level since the start of 2025.

data.title: Bank of Canada on Alert for Quick Change in Inflation Dynamics, Minutes Say
